todayRecap: Active day with multiple parallel workstreams. Key output: Interest Carry Forecast model sent to John Stone — Stone praised it and asked for hotels tab (Symphony Park, Norterra, AC Fort Worth) plus CrossPoint Ph I principal; Jack committed to adding those. R45 leasing assumptions shared with Sarah Clark for 2026 asset plan budget creation. Crosstimbers site plan updated in SharePoint for Houston DD. GPM Life lien on 4890 Alpha Rd was resolved via email (Clint Hennessey confirmed date ~2008), so the in-person meeting was canceled. Major new issue emerged late afternoon: AC Marriott Element maturity date crisis — Don Braun (Hall Group Vice Chairman) sent Michele Wheeler a detailed memo proposing a 6-month extension of the DSCR covenant/maturity date to May 1, 2027 with 25bps fee (prorated from 50bps), citing inability to hit DSCR by year-end. Leadership (Stone, Wheeler, Butler, Jack) plus Winstead counsel (Roxanne Hajikhani, Andy Dow) being coordinated for a call, likely Thu 4/16 or Fri 4/17. Houston industrial financing: Pinnacle Financial sent indicative terms (SHC: $10M / Crosstimbers: $13.2M, 60% LTC, SOFR+245); Texas Capital verbal at mid-200s over SOFR with written terms by Friday. Harmony and Pinnacle remain the only non-recourse options.

priorityStatus.activity: Sent to John Stone. Stone loved it — asked for hotels (Symphony Park, Norterra, AC FW) + CrossPoint Ph I principal tabs. Jack committed to adding both.
Hall Group (Don Braun) formally proposed 6-month extension to May 2027 with 25bps fee. Call being scheduled with Winstead counsel for next week.
Pinnacle indicative terms received (non-recourse, 60% LTC). Texas Capital verbal terms given, written by Friday. Harmony still the only confirmed non-recourse.
Crosstimbers site plan updated. Reid shared latest SoHo plans via email (Grant can't access SharePoint). IFP page-turn scheduled 5/4/26.
Leasing assumptions verified by Reid Watler and sent to Sarah Clark for 2026 budget creation.
Final Ranger pay app received. Awaiting architect signature, then Jack to process for draw.
